testcase.name: test_buy_airtime_simulation

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected simulated mode assert False + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa134012bf80>('simulated', True) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa134012bf80> = {'amount': 1.0, 'commission': 0.0, 'net_amount': 1.0, 'network': 'MTN', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bulkclix_services.py:140: in test_buy_airtime_simulation assert data.get("simulated", True), "Expected simulated mode" E AssertionError: Expected simulated mode E assert False E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa134012bf80>('simulated', True) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa134012bf80> = {'amount': 1.0, 'commission': 0.0, 'net_amount': 1.0, 'network': 'MTN', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_service_deducts_balance

failure.message: AssertionError: Balance should decrease. Before: 20.5, After: 20.5 assert 20.5 < 20.5

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bulkclix_services.py:422: in test_service_deducts_balance assert final < initial, f"Balance should decrease. Before: {initial}, After: {final}" E AssertionError: Balance should decrease. Before: 20.5, After: 20.5 E assert 20.5 < 20.5
